items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 10 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km with the first 2 km at an easy pace (7:00 min/km), followed by 2 km at a tempo pace of 5:45 min/km, and finish with 2 km easy. Keep your heart rate around 160-170 bpm during the tempo segment.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 5x500m intervals at 5:15 min/km pace with 2 minutes recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes. Aim for a heart rate of 170-180 bpm during intervals.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Full-body weight training session focusing on compound movements. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, deadlifts, and bench press, with 1-2 minutes rest between sets.
